title: 写实摄影风格创作
description: A photorealistic, high-resolution commercial photograph of a {argument name="car model and color" default="bright blue Alpine A110 R sports car"} parked in the foreground inside a massive aircraft hangar. The car feature
prompt_raw: A photorealistic, high-resolution commercial photograph of a bright blue Alpine A110 R sports car parked in the foreground inside a massive aircraft hangar. The car features a black carbon fiber hood, black roof, black alloy wheels, and a front license plate reading "A110 R". Directly behind the car, dominating the background, is a white Airbus A320 commercial airliner with a blue tail. The hangar has a highly polished, reflective concrete floor that mirrors the car and plane. To the left, a sign on the metal wall reads "HANGAR 05 MAINTENANCE". The hangar doors are wide open, revealing a bright, overcast sky and a distant cityscape. The lighting is soft and cinematic, highlighting the sleek aerodynamic curves of both vehicles.
prompt_preview: A photorealistic, high-resolution commercial photograph of a {argument name="car model and color" default="bright blue Alpine A110 R sports car"} parked in the foreground inside a massive aircraft hangar. The car feature
prompt_display_cn:
案例「car model and color」属于摄影写实。这是一张摄影写实类案例，重点在真实镜头感、人物/物体质感、光线、景深、环境和摄影语言。适合改成商业摄影、人像摄影、产品摄影、纪实照片或电影剧照。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A 照片写实, high-resolution commercial photograph of a 【car model and color：bright blue Alpine A110 R sports car】 parked in the foreground inside a massive aircraft hangar. The car features a black carbon fiber hood, black roof, black alloy wheels, and a front license plate reading "【license plate text：A110 R】". Directly behind the car, dominating the 背景, is a 【airplane model：white Airbus A320 commercial airliner】 with a blue tail. The hangar has a highly polished, reflective concrete floor that mirrors the car and plane. To the left, a sign on the metal wall reads "【hangar sign text：HANGAR 05 MAINTENANCE】". The hangar doors are wide open, revealing a bright, overcast sky and a distant cityscape. The 光线ing is soft and 电影感, high光线ing the sleek aerodynamic curves of both vehicles.
prompt_template_cn:
生成一张【拍摄主题】的摄影写实画面。

主体：
画面主体是【主体对象】，处于【动作/状态】，具有真实自然的细节。

场景：
背景环境为【场景地点】，包含【环境元素】，整体氛围为【氛围】。

摄影语言：
使用【镜头类型/焦段】，构图为【构图方式】，光线为【光线条件】，景深为【景深效果】。

质感要求：
皮肤/材质/物体细节真实，避免塑料感和过度磨皮。画面像真实摄影作品。

输出要求：
比例为【画面比例】，风格为【摄影风格】。
variables_json: [{"key":"field_1","label":"拍摄主题","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入拍摄主题","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_2","label":"主体对象","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入主体对象","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_3","label":"动作/状态","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入动作/状态","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_4","label":"场景地点","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入场景地点","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_5","label":"环境元素","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入环境元素","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"field_6","label":"氛围","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入氛围","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_7","label":"镜头类型/焦段","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入镜头类型/焦段","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_8","label":"构图方式","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入构图方式","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_9","label":"光线条件","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入光线条件","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_10","label":"景深效果","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入景深效果","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_11","label":"画面比例","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入画面比例","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_12","label":"摄影风格","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入摄影风格","required":true,"type":"text"}]
